name: Hyprland
description: Dynamic tiling Wayland compositor for Linux — smooth animations, extensive customization, plugin ecosystem.

seo.title: Hyprland — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Hyprland: Dynamic tiling Wayland compositor for Linux — smooth animations, extensive customization, plugin ecosystem.

when_to_use: Highly customized tiling Wayland setup for a developer workstation
Smooth animation desktop environment for Linux power users
Plugin-extended compositor for bespoke Linux workflow
Keyboard-driven multi-monitor workspace on Arch Linux
Minimal GPU-accelerated desktop replacing X11 setups

cons: Some apps still have Wayland quirks
review.verdict: The most beautiful tiling WM on Linux today — worth the Arch-level config pain if aesthetics matter.
review.best_for: Linux enthusiasts on Wayland who want animations and heavy keyboard customization
review.not_for: Users who want turnkey desktops or cant tolerate config tinkering

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
